200.description:
SSE event stream. Event types: `delta` (text chunk),
`usage` (final token + cache counts), `done` (terminator),
`error` (mid-stream failure). Each event's `data:` payload
is JSON.

schema.description: Standardized error response structure matching application error domains
schema.title: AppError
